name: nixieepulse
description: Local coding time tracker for VS Code with JSON storage, dashboard, and GitHub profile SVG sync.

commands.title: NixieePulse: Open GitHub Sync Setup Guide

nixieepulse.idleTimeoutSeconds.description: How many seconds after the last editor activity should still count as active coding time.

nixieepulse.tickIntervalSeconds.description: How often NixieePulse updates active time.

nixieepulse.saveIntervalSeconds.description: How often NixieePulse writes collected statistics to stats.json.

nixieepulse.trackFiles.description: Store per-file time in stats.json. Paths are stored relative to the workspace when possible.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.enabled.description: Enable GitHub profile README synchronization using the GitHub REST API.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.owner.description: GitHub account or organization that owns the profile README repository.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.repo.description: GitHub repository name for the profile README, usually the same as your username.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.readmePath.description: Path to the README file inside the repository.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.mode.description: How the GitHub profile block should be rendered. Use svg for a clean profile card.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.svgPath.description: Path to the generated SVG card inside the repository when mode is svg or both.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.iconFolderPath.description: Optional local folder with custom SVG language icons. File names should match language ids, for example python.svg, typescript.svg, markdown.svg. Icons are embedded into the generated SVG card.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.autoSyncMinute.description: Automatic GitHub sync interval in minutes. Set 0 to disable periodic sync.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.syncOnExit.description: Try to sync GitHub profile when VS Code shuts down. Periodic sync is still more reliable.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.commitMessage.description: Commit message used for GitHub profile updates.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.maxLanguages.description: Maximum number of languages shown in the generated GitHub profile block.

nixieepulse.githubProfile.hiddenLanguage.description: Language ids hidden from the generated GitHub profile card. This keeps helper file types like ignore and pip-requirements out of the public SVG.
